segments.text: But now, thus says the Lord,
Fear not, for I have redeemed you; I have called you by your name; You are Mine.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; And through the rivers, they shall not overflow you. When you walk through the fire, you shall not be burned, Nor shall the flame scorch you.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For I am the Lord your God, The Holy One of Israel, your Savior; I gave Egypt for your ransom, Ethiopia and Seba in your place.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Since you were precious in My sight, You have been honored, And I have loved you; Therefore I will give men for you, And people for your life.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Fear not, for I am with you; I will bring your descendants from the east, And gather you from the west;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I will say to the north, 'Give them up!' And to the south, 'Do not keep them back!' Bring My sons from afar, And My daughters from the ends of the earth—
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Everyone who is called by My name, Whom I have created for My glory; I have formed him, yes, I have made him.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Bring out the blind people who have eyes, And the deaf who have ears.

Let all the nations be gathered together, And let the people be assembled. Who among them can declare this, And show us former things? Let them bring out their witnesses, that they may be justified; Or let them hear and say, 'It is truth.'
You are My witnesses, That you may know and believe Me, And understand that I am He. Before Me there was no God formed, Nor shall there be after Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I, even I, am the Lord, And besides Me there is no savior.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I have declared and saved, I have proclaimed, And there was no foreign god among you; Therefore you are My witnesses, that I am God.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Indeed before the day was, I am He; And there is no one who can deliver out of My hand; I work, and who will reverse it?
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Thus says the Lord, your Redeemer, The Holy One of Israel:
For your sake I will send to Babylon, And bring them all down as fugitives— The Chaldeans, who rejoice in their ships.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I am the Lord, your Holy One, The Creator of Israel, your King.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Thus says the Lord, who makes a way in the sea And a path through the mighty waters,
Who brings forth the chariot and horse, The army and the power (They shall lie down together, they shall not rise; They are extinguished, they are quenched like a wick):
Do not remember the former things, Nor consider the things of old.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Behold, I will do a new thing, Now it shall spring forth; Shall you not know it? I will even make a road in the wilderness And rivers in the desert.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The beast of the field will honor Me, The jackals and the ostriches, Because I give waters in the wilderness And rivers in the desert, To give drink to My people, My chosen.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: This people I have formed for Myself; They shall declare My praise.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: But you have not called upon Me, O Jacob; And you have been weary of Me, O Israel.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: You have not brought Me the sheep for your burnt offerings, Nor have you honored Me with your sacrifices. I have not caused you to serve with grain offerings, Nor wearied you with incense.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: You have bought Me no sweet cane with money, Nor have you satisfied Me with the fat of your sacrifices; But you have burdened Me with your sins, You have wearied Me with your iniquities.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I, even I, am He who blots out your transgressions for My own sake; And I will not remember your sins.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Put Me in remembrance; Let us contend together; State your case, that you may be acquitted.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Your first father sinned, And your mediators have transgressed against Me.
Therefore I will profane the princes of the sanctuary; I will give Jacob to the curse, And Israel to reproaches.
